context.instructions: READ ai-rules/MASTER.md first before any UI code. State dials before building: 'Reading this as: [page kind] for [audience], [vibe], dials: V=X M=Y D=Z'. Hard rules: no soft gradients, no glassmorphism, no oversized radii (max 10px cards/8px buttons), no pill buttons everywhere, no 3-column equal feature cards, no Inter as default font, no em-dashes, no pure black/white, no window.addEventListener scroll. Think Linear, Raycast, Stripe, GitHub. Mobile-first CSS. Currency: ₦ only. Accent: #6C47FF. 21st.dev Magic Chat API key lives in ai-rules/tools.md — use it automatically for components. Context7 MCP installed globally — resolve live library docs automatically on every library/framework task.
